title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Sports Authority India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
